summary: Comprehensive testing of PO Draft Review and Export feature (iteration_74). All 15 backend tests pass. All frontend UI tests pass. New endpoints verified: GET /po-drafts/{id}, GET /po-drafts/{id}/export, PATCH /po-drafts/{id}/status. All frontend components verified: PO Drafts tab, list table, detail drawer with header/lines/export/status controls, Action Center View Draft link, Item Detail PO draft clickable indicator.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking (same as previous iterations)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id} returns full draft with all fields (po_draft_id, created_at, customer_id, customer_name, lines, source, status, total_qty, total_lines)
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id} returns 404 for nonexistent draft
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/export returns JSON with Content-Disposition header
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/export Content-Disposition includes draft_id and .json extension
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/export payload matches stored draft exactly
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/export returns 404 for nonexistent draft
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/status?status=sent updates status
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/status?status=archived updates status
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/status invalid status returns 422
Backend: PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/status nonexistent draft returns 404
Backend REGRESSION: Action Center endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Supply Coverage endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Demand Signals endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Exceptions endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Dashboard Summary endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: PO Drafts list endpoint still works
Frontend: PO Drafts tab visible (data-testid='inv-tab-po-drafts')
Frontend: PO Drafts list table renders (data-testid='inv-po-drafts-table')
Frontend: Draft rows show ID, date, status badge, lines, total qty, items
Frontend: Clicking draft ID opens detail drawer (data-testid='inv-po-draft-detail')
Frontend: Detail drawer shows header info (data-testid='inv-po-draft-header')
Frontend: Detail drawer shows draft lines table (data-testid='inv-po-draft-lines')
Frontend: Export JSON button in detail drawer (data-testid='inv-po-draft-export')
Frontend: Mark as Sent button visible for draft status (data-testid='inv-po-draft-mark-sent')
Frontend: Archive button (data-testid='inv-po-draft-archive')
Frontend: Action Center PO draft confirmation has View Draft link (data-testid='inv-po-draft-view')
Frontend: View Draft link opens draft detail drawer correctly
Frontend: Item Detail shows Last PO Draft section (data-testid='inv-detail-po-draft')
Frontend: Item Detail PO draft indicator is clickable and opens draft detail drawer
Frontend REGRESSION: Action Center multi-select and PO generation works
Frontend REGRESSION: Dashboard summary cards display correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 998-1007: GET /po-drafts/{id} correctly returns full draft from po_drafts collection excluding _id
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 1010-1028: GET /po-drafts/{id}/export correctly returns JSON with Content-Disposition header for download
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 980-995: PATCH /po-drafts/{id}/status correctly validates status values and updates document
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 1168-1243: PODraftsPanel correctly fetches and renders drafts list with all required columns
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 1249-1369: PODraftDetailDrawer correctly displays header, lines table, and action buttons
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 1528-1537: ItemDetailDrawer correctly renders clickable Last PO Draft section when draft exists
seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace (customer_id: 366bfcce-4d68-4daf-b9f4-cb05a35de8c8). Multiple PO drafts exist from previous testing iterations. Items: IMPORT-ITEM-B, TEST-ITEM-WARN, SPAM-LITE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PO Draft Review and Export feature fully tested. New endpoints: GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id} (returns full draft), GET /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/export (JSON download with Content-Disposition), PATCH /api/inventory-ledger/po-drafts/{id}/status (status transitions: draft->sent->archived). Frontend: PODraftsPanel shows list table with draft ID, created date, status badge, lines count, total qty, items list. PODraftDetailDrawer shows header (ID, status, created, customer), summary (lines, total_qty, source), lines table (#, item, qty, source), action buttons (Export JSON, Mark as Sent, Archive). Action Center confirmation includes View Draft button (inv-po-draft-view). ItemDetailDrawer shows clickable Last PO Draft section (inv-detail-po-draft) when draft exists for item. 13 PO drafts exist for Hormel, most with 'archived' status from status update tests.

get_po_draft.response: Full draft object with po_draft_id, created_at, customer_id, customer_name, lines[], source, status, total_qty, total_lines

item_detail_po_draft.location: Item Detail drawer, shows when item has PO draft
